title: When Feedback Beats Every Static Policy but Not Structured Control: Exact Benchmarking of Recurrent RL in a Supply-Chain DES
highlights: All 65,536 admissible open-loop calendars are evaluated.
RecurrentPPO robustly exceeds the complete static frontier.
A belief-based controller is practically equivalent to RecurrentPPO.
Worst-product service non-inferiority is not established.
The protocol separates feedback value from a neural premium.
